race.comment: OBSESSIVE NATURE (1) tough old sprinter who was a month between runs with a closing fourth over 900m at Wellington in BM66 grade. Fitter now from the good gate and sure to go close with the 4kg claimer engaged. BROGANS CREEK (15) nine-year-old gelding with his hoof on the till. Has finished in the minor money at all three runs this time in and set to peak despite drawing out. Each way. THE MOOCH (12) has been in the market at her last couple of starts and the stable will be looking for the blinkers to do the trick. Tempo suits and stays in the calculations. ELLOFADUDE (6) lightly raced gelding with a stack of upside. Ran on late from the long layoff with a narrow fourth over 1000m at Muswellbrook. Comes to hand quickly and can go on with it today. DENMAN BANDIT (4) is racing well but doesn't get the same set-up. Place best.
